attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.AGREEMENT_ID, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.CUSTOMER_ID, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.AGREEMENT_NUM, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.AGREEMENT_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.OWNED_BY_PERSON_ID, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.TERM_ID, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.REVENUE_LIMIT_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.AMOUNT, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.DESCRIPTION, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.EXPIRATION_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.TEMPLATE_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ORG_ID, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.PM_AGREEMENT_REFERENCE, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.PM_PRODUCT_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.OWNING_ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.AGREEMENT_CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.INVOICE_LIMIT_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.CUSTOMER_ORDER_NUMBER, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ADVANCE_REQUIRED, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.BILLING_SEQUENCE, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.START_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.LINE_OF_ACCOUNT, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.PAYMENT_SET_ID, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ADVANCE_AMOUNT, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE16, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE17, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE18, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE19, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE20, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE21, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE22, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE23, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE24, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE25, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL,
(
select AGREEMENT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL
minus
select AGREEMENT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL
) ACM
where 
 ACM.AGREEMENT_ID = STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.AGREEMENT_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_AGREEMENTS_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME
